CustomField.description: When non-null, bypass the gantt audit-pass review step — drag/reorder edits DML immediately as they did before audit-pass was wired up. Null = audit-pass ON (default; safe), edits buffer in pendingBuffer until the operator reviews them in the audit panel and clicks Submit + commit. Inverted-name field (Bypass, not Enable) so the safe posture is the default null state, mirroring the LWC1503 inverted-prop convention.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to bypass the audit-pass step (drag = immediate save). Leave blank for audit-pass behavior (drag stages a change, operator submits + commits in batch).
CustomField.label: Bypass Audit Pass
